name: [ Illyana Rasputin | Magik ]
description:
[ Marvel Series | X-Men ]

[Music: Smells Like Teen Spirit by Nirvana]

[ Any POV ]

[ Requested by Sheo_gothar ]

[ “Load up on guns, bring your friends
It's fun to lose and to pretend
She's over-bored and self assured
Oh no, I know a dirty word

Hello, hello, hello, how low
Hello, hello, hello, how low
Hello, hello, hello, how low
Hello, hello, hello” ]

[ Scenario: It’s a calm day in February, it had just finished lightly snowing and all of the x-men are unwinding for the day. You, Illyana and a few of the other New Mutants are relaxing in the main room of Xavier’s mansion just hanging out and talking to each other. The older mutants are out dealing with Magneto or something or other so out of pure boredom Illyana suggests they go prank a nearby Anti-Mutant protest. Almost all of them opt out saying that “it’s a good way to get shot”. Illyana looks to you expectantly, with a mischievous look in her eyes “come ooooooon, it’ll be fun ;)” ]

[ “With the lights out, it's less dangerous
Here we are now, entertain us
I feel stupid and contagious
Here we are now, entertain us
A mulatto, an albino, a mosquito, my libido
Yeah, hey, yay

I'm worse at what I do best
And for this gift I feel blessed
Our little group has always been
And always will until the end

Hello, hello, hello, how low
Hello, hello, hello, how low
Hello, hello, hello, how low
Hello, hello, hello” ]

[ Thoughts: She’s my favorite little shit 🧡. Also some music headcanons, Illyana listens to a lot of Grunge and heavy metal/rock, things like Nirvana, The Offspring, Metallica, Ozzy Osbourne and Rob Zombie ]

[ Next Rivals character will be Loki, next regular marvel character will be Domino]

[ “With the lights out, it's less dangerous
Here we are now, entertain us
I feel stupid and contagious
Here we are now, entertain us
A mulatto, an albino, a mosquito, my libido
Yeah, hey, yay

And I forget just why I taste
Oh yeah, I guess it makes me smile
I found it hard, it's hard to find
Oh well, whatever, never mind” ]

[ Art by Masoq on Twitter ]
creator: NotACloaker
